summary: Frontend-only verification of Simpro admin page fixes. All 8 review requirements PASS: page renders, eye toggle on Client Secret flips type password<->text and renders typed text visibly, helper paragraphs exist under all 8 fields (6 original + 2 new) using 'text-xs text-slate-500' classes, Company helper mentions 'Setup → System → Info & Licence', Client ID helper mentions 'Setup → System → Integrations → OAuth2 Clients'. The two new whiteboard fields (simpro-staff-custom-field, simpro-staff-field-value) are plain text inputs with NO eye toggle and NO mask. Save flow with 'Show on Whiteboard' / 'Yes' persists across reload (round-trips through backend GET). Mask preservation works: changing only company_id and saving keeps secret saved chip as '••••t_x9'. Regression: navixy, microsoft365, textmagic admin pages all render without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: SimproAdmin.jsx helper text mentions default poll = 600 but the empty-state default in code is 900 — minor copy inconsistency (non-blocking).
InputWithToggle eye button now has correct data-testid suffix '-eye' and aria-label flips Show/Hide — clean, accessible implementation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simpro admin UI is fully verified. The integrations form helper pattern (Field + Helper component beneath) is the canonical approach; if the same treatment is requested for navixy/microsoft365/textmagic admins, those pages currently do NOT have per-field helper paragraphs.
